name: EndpointEnvironmentType
title: NDH Endpoint EnvironmentType
description: This extension enables NDH to classify endpoint environment context, using a CodeableConcept with extensible binding to NdhEndpointEnvironmentVS so consumers can distinguish operational deployment targets consistently; it is used in Endpoint.

element.definition: This extension enables NDH to classify endpoint environment context, using a CodeableConcept with extensible binding to NdhEndpointEnvironmentVS so consumers can distinguish operational deployment targets consistently; it is used in Endpoint.
